mapper.select: SELECT user_id, oauth_provider, provider_user_id, email, display_name, role, enabled, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_id, oauth_provider, provider_user_id, email, display_name, role, enabled, last_login_at, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider} AND provider_user_id = #{providerUserId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( oauth_provider, provider_user_id, email, display_name, role, enabled, last_login_at ) VALUES ( #{oauthProvider}, #{providerUserId}, #{email}, #{displayName}, 'USER', TRUE, #{lastLoginAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE email = VALUES(email), display_name = VALUES(display_name), last_login_at = VALUES(last_login_at), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(6)
